name: Palatschinken+
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the brandy with the jam in a separate bowl.
2. In a large bowl, sift together flour, salt, and sugar.
3. Gradually add milk to the dry ingredients, stirring until smooth.
4. Beat eggs lightly and stir them into the batter.
5. Heat a 9-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat and melt some butter.
6. Pour enough batter to cover the pan thinly but completely.
7. Rotate the pan slightly after pouring the batter to spread it evenly.
8. Cook for about 2-3 minutes until lightly browned on the underside.
9. Turn the crepe carefully, and cook briefly on the other side.
10. Transfer the crepe to a serving platter and brush with jam.
11. Roll up the crepe neatly and place it on an ovenproof or silver platter.
12. Repeat steps 5-11 until all batter is used.
13. Dust finished Palatschinken generously with vanilla sugar or powdered sugar before serving.
